description_long: This is a stand-up pouch of Japanese prepared food, featuring a glossy, full-color printed exterior. The front displays a vivid image of a hamburger steak covered in rich brown sauce, garnished with mashed potatoes and greens, with steam rising to suggest warmth and freshness. Gold and black text, along with a 7-Eleven Premium logo, are prominently displayed on the front, indicating a premium product. The back is densely covered with Japanese text, including preparation instructions, nutritional information, and various symbols, all printed in black, red, and blue on a white background. The pouch is made of flexible plastic, with heat-sealed edges and a gusseted bottom for standing upright. The overall appearance is modern and appetizing, designed to attract attention in a retail or convenience store setting.
description: A glossy, stand-up pouch of Japanese hamburger steak with rich food imagery and detailed labeling, designed for retail display.
description_view_0: Front view shows a vivid food image, gold and black branding, and the 7-Eleven Premium logo.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile and heat-sealed edges of the flexible pouch.
description_view_2: Back view displays dense Japanese text, nutritional labeling, and preparation instructions on a white background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the pouch's slim edge and sealed construction.
attribute_brand_logo: 7-Eleven Premium logo on the upper left front, rectangular with gold and black colors.
attribute_flavor_indication: Image of hamburger steak with brown sauce and mashed potatoes; gold text suggests premium quality but no explicit flavor text.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Yes, detailed nutritional and ingredient information is visible on the back in Japanese.
